records.question: Which stations named East Croydon have exactly 6.341 annual interchanges, exactly 20.551 annual entry and exit, at most 6 platforms, and whose main services are Brighton Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'East Croydon' AND station.annual_interchanges = 6.341 AND station.annual_entry_exit = 20.551 AND station.number_of_platforms <= 6 AND station.main_services = 'Brighton Main Line'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
WHERE Name = 'East Croydon'
  AND Annual_interchanges = 6.341
  AND Annual_entry_exit = 20.551
  AND Number_of_Platforms <= 6
  AND Main_Services = 'Brighton Main Line'

records.question: Which stations have at least 85.38 total passengers and annual interchanges of 9.157 or more?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.total_passengers >= 85.38 AND station.annual_interchanges >= 9.157
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
WHERE station.Total_Passengers >= 85.38
  AND station.Annual_interchanges >= 9.157

records.question: Which stations in London have no more than 3.832 annual interchanges, at most 40.44 total passengers, and are served by trains where the time is exactly 11:15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE train.time = '11:15' AND station.annual_interchanges <= 3.832 AND station.location = 'London' AND station.total_passengers <= 40.44
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.Station_ID = train_station.Station_ID
JOIN train ON train_station.Train_ID = train.Train_ID
WHERE station.Location = 'London'
  AND station.Annual_interchanges <= 3.832
  AND station.Total_Passengers <= 40.44
  AND train.Time = '11:15'

records.question: Which stations named London St Pancras in London have exactly 15 platforms, serve Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar, and have at least 22.996 annual entry-exits, at least 3.676 interchanges, and at least 26.672 total passengers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.annual_entry_exit >= 22.996 AND station.annual_interchanges >= 3.676 AND station.name = 'London St Pancras' AND station.location = 'London' AND station.number_of_platforms = 15 AND station.main_services = 'Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar' AND station.total_passengers >= 26.672
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
WHERE Name = 'London St Pancras'
  AND Location = 'London'
  AND Number_of_Platforms = 15
  AND Main_Services = 'Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar'
  AND Annual_entry_exit >= 22.996
  AND Annual_interchanges >= 3.676
  AND Total_Passengers >= 26.672

records.question: Which Glasgow Central stations in Glasgow that serve the West Coast Main Line have at least 3.018 annual interchanges and at most 17 platforms, and are connected to the Island Express train that runs daily at 16:59?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE train.service = 'Daily' AND train.time = '16:59' AND station.annual_interchanges >= 3.018 AND station.location = 'Glasgow' AND station.main_services = 'West Coast Main Line' AND train.name = 'Island Express' AND station.name = 'Glasgow Central' AND station.number_of_platforms <= 17
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.Station_ID = train_station.Station_ID
JOIN train ON train_station.Train_ID = train.Train_ID
WHERE station.Name LIKE '%Glasgow Central%'
  AND station.Location = 'Glasgow'
  AND station.Main_Services LIKE '%West Coast Main Line%'
  AND station.Annual_interchanges >= 3.018
  AND station.Number_of_Platforms <= 17
  AND train.Name = 'Island Express'
  AND train.Service = 'daily'
  AND train.Time = '16:59'

records.question: Which stations named London Waterloo in London have at most 103.534 total passengers, at least 94.046 annual entry and exit, exactly 9.489 annual interchanges, at least 19 platforms, and main services that are South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.total_passengers <= 103.534 AND station.annual_entry_exit >= 94.046 AND station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 19 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line' AND station.location = 'London'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.Station_ID
FROM station
WHERE Name = 'London Waterloo'
  AND Location = 'London'
  AND Total_Passengers <= 103.534
  AND Annual_entry_exit >= 94.046
  AND Annual_interchanges = 9.489
  AND Number_of_Platforms >= 19
  AND Main_Services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'
